title: Rich Decadent Kenyan Ume-plum Tagine
description: A rich and flavorful stew originating from Kenya, featuring the exotic ume-plum and bhuna spices. Perfect for adventurous eaters and kosher-friendly cooking.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the garlic and ginger and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken thighs and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the ume-plum jam, bhuna spice mix, kosher salt, and black pepper. Stir to combine.
Pour in the chicken broth and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Cover the pot and transfer it to the oven. Cook for 30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the sauce has thickened.
Remove the pot from the oven and let it cool slightly before serving.
